title: bus.agent.activity v1
description: Host-level agent activity stream — every tool call, tool return, and heartbeat from every Claude Code or Codex session on the host fires here. Produced by adapters/osc133/ (Claude Code) and home-automation Codex adapter. Lets us observe cross-project agent behavior and build efficiency metrics. Volume: ~5k events/hour on a busy host.

ts.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp of the activity.

event.description: What happened. tool_call is the dominant case. heartbeat is emitted by Codex agents on a periodic interval. ended fires when a Codex session terminates cleanly. started fires at agent session initialization. permission_requested fires when an agent requires user permission before proceeding.

agent_kind.description: The host-side agent runtime kind. host_claude_code = Claude Code sessions; host_codex = Codex CLI agents (e.g. home-automation).

agent_id.description: ULID of the Claude Code session that produced this event. For host-level activity this is the host session ID; for subagents this is the shuttle session ID.

session_id.description: ULID of the conversation/session context. For host sessions this equals agent_id; for subagents this is the shuttle conversation ULID.

conversation_id.description: ULID of the top-level conversation this activity belongs to.

project.description: The project name the agent was operating in when this event fired. Matches the repository directory name or 'main' for host-level operations.

tool_name.description: Name of the tool invoked (e.g. Bash, Read, Edit, Write, Agent). Null on tool_return and error events.

tool_summary.description: Truncated one-line summary of the tool call: a JSON object with 'command', 'file_path', 'description', or similar key describing what was invoked. Null on tool_return and error events.

cwd.description: Absolute path of the working directory at time of the call. For subagents this will point into .claude/worktrees/<id>/.

git_branch.description: Name of the git branch the session was on when the tool was invoked. Only present on a subset of events.

pane_id_qualified.description: Zellij pane identifier in zellij:session:pane form (e.g. 'zellij:command-center:7'). Allows correlating activity to specific terminal panes.

agent.description: Agent runtime identifier. 'claude-code' for Claude Code subagents; 'codex' for Codex CLI agents.

source_kind.description: Originating adapter kind (e.g. 'codex'). Mirrors agent for now; reserved for future adapter-level routing.

display.description: Zellij display name of the pane the subagent is running in (e.g. 'nervous-bus [.claude]'). Only present for subagent sessions in worktrees.

worktree.description: Absolute path of the worktree the subagent is operating in. Only present when the agent is a dispatched subagent running in a git worktree (not the host main working tree).

iter.description: Iteration number within the agent session. Present on a subset of events.
